title: spermacoce macrantha
intro: Spermacoce macrantha, also known as Red Clammyweed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Spermacoce macrantha include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Spermacoce macrantha can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for topical and internal use.
